name: Hailee Steinfeld
description:
Hailee Steinfeld, born December 11, 1996, in Tarzana, Los Angeles, is an American actress, singer, and songwriter. She gained fame with her breakout role in the 2010 film "True Grit," earning critical acclaim and an Academy Award nomination. Steinfeld continued to build her acting career with roles in "Ender's Game," "Romeo & Juliet," and "Begin Again." Alongside acting, she launched her music career with the release of her debut single "Love Myself" in 2015 and subsequent EP "Haiz." Her versatility shines in films like "Pitch Perfect 2" and "Pitch Perfect 3." Steinfeld starred in "The Edge of Seventeen" and "Bumblebee," and voiced characters in "Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse" and "Arcane." She is set to star in the Apple TV+ series "Dickinson" and Disney+'s Marvel series "Hawkeye." Steinfeld also reprised her voice role in "Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse" and its upcoming sequel.
